markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on Q1 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance is strong:** Post-holiday sessions hit an all-time high, and keyword rankings (positions 2–10) are skyrocketing, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**LLM traffic is highly engaged:** Users referred from LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT) have higher dwell times than those from Google, confirming that AI is effectively matching content to relevant audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Reddit strategy is approved:** A new content pipeline will launch in mid-to-late February to build karma and establish a presence on the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Lead tracking is the next priority:** UTMs will be added to Calendly links in blog CTAs to attribute leads directly to specific articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Optimization

  - [**Performance Highlights (3-Month Review):**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Post-holiday traffic hit an all-time high, fully recovering from a minor seasonal dip.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Keyword Rankings:** First-page rankings (positions 2–10) have skyrocketed, showing Google is recognizing site authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic from LLMs is growing and shows higher engagement (dwell time) than Google traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**High-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [**"Trends & Benchmark" Content:** Extremely popular (e.g., "benchmark conversion rate").](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
      - [**"B2B SaaS Growth Strategy" Content:** Also performing very well.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Future Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** In March, refresh existing articles with TLDRs and FAQs to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [**New Content:** Focus keyword research on the high-performing "benchmark" and "growth strategy" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Reddit Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Establish a presence on Reddit to drive traffic and build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Content pipeline launches mid-to-late February.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Account Setup:** Understory to accept GrowthX's email transfer request and provide a banner image (size to be provided by GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Content Cadence:** GrowthX will post weekly articles to the Understory profile.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Build karma before posting in subreddits to avoid bot flags and bans.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Reporting:** GrowthX is developing a Reddit-specific reporting method.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### New Initiatives & Lead Tracking

  - [**Lead Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Problem:** Inability to attribute leads from blog CTAs to specific articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add UTMs to Calendly links in all blog CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**Future Idea:** Test a more prominent, tailored CTA (e.g., sidebar) to improve conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [**Backlinks:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [**GrowthX Service:** GrowthX is investigating a service to secure \~5 backlinks/month via a partner network. Pricing is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [**Understory Initiative:** Understory will leverage its own network for informal backlink asks. GrowthX will provide messaging templates.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [**New Service Keyword Research:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**LinkedIn Thought Leadership:** GrowthX will research keywords for this upcoming service once Understory provides messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**HubSpot & Outbound Sync:** GrowthX will add keywords for these tools to the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Resend Reddit account ownership transfer request.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [Provide Reddit banner image size specs.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Deliver content audit with new keyword list by end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Confirm pricing and details for backlink service by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [Provide backlink request messaging templates for Understory's use.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Brainstorm and propose blog CRO optimizations (e.g., sidebar CTA).](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
      - [Investigate the 82 unindexed pages in Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [Accept Reddit account ownership transfer.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [Provide banner image for Reddit profile.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Review new keyword list and flag any topics to remove.](https://fathom.video/share/9kzNocwKrgx6eKXScxjTNYfnz9DQzTgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
